---
title: FDA Guidance Digest
comments: false
toc: false
---

High-value regulatory guidance summaries and interpretation posts.

## Core Guidance Summaries

- [Considerations for the use of the Plausible Mechanism Framework to Develop Individualized Therapies that Target Specific Genetic Conditions with Known Biological Cause](/posts/Considerations_for_the_use_of_the_Plausible_Mechanism_Framework_to_Develop_Indiv/)
- [FDA Guidance Statistical Guidance on Reporting Results from Studies Evaluating Diagnostic Tests](/posts/FDA-Guidance-Statistical-Guidance-on-Reporting-Results-from-Studies-Evaluating-Diagnostic-Tests_Translated/)
- [Considerations Regarding Non-Interventional Studies for Drug and Biological Products Guidance for Industry](/posts/Considerations_Regarding_Non-Interventional_Studies_for_Drug_and_Biological_Products_Guidance_for_Industry/)
- [Use of Real-World Evidence to Support Regulatory Decision-Making for Medical Devices](/posts/RWE_medical_device_FDA/)

## Framework and Context Posts

- [Comment on Framework for FDA's Real-World Evidence Program - part 1](/posts/Review_Framework_for_FDAs_RWE_Program/)
- [Comment on Framework for FDA's Real-World Evidence Program - part 2](/posts/Review_Framework_for_FDAs_RWE_Program_part2/)
- [Comment on ICH M14 Guideline - part 1](/posts/Review_ICH_M14_Guideline_part1/)
- [Comment on ICH M14 Guideline - part 2](/posts/Review_ICH_M14_Guideline_part2/)

## How to use this page

- Use these posts as briefing notes before protocol meetings.
- Send links to cross-functional stakeholders to align on evidence expectations.
- Pair each guidance post with one method post from [Problem Index](/tags/) to convert policy into analysis decisions.
